subject: Fwd: Standish Building
body:
fyi


-----Original Message-----
From: Dan Chipman <dan_chipman@yahoo.com>
To: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Cc: CMi3540012@aol.com; Darren Indyke <dkiesq@aol.com>; Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>; Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; William Rowles <w_rowles@yahoo.com>; Monique Harry <moniqueharry@hotmail.com>
Sent: Thu, 14 Feb 2008 9:20 am
Subject: Standish Building




John,

As a backup to our conversation this A.M.. I recommend that we terminate our contract with Standish Building Co. on failure to produce as agreed. We had the issue with A. Smith and then John and I spent time meeting on St. John, getting redirected and with the promise that he would be on site mid week to start our project with a competent foreman and crew. He has failed to show or call.?One of the ithings that I wanted to gain by our meeting was that Lafayette was doing all it could to honor our end of the deal. I trust that you will cover all of the legal bases and get Newman and Moll (if that is agreed upon with Charles and Darren) on board ASAP.

?

Thanks, Dan


Be a better friend, newshound, and know-it-all with Yahoo! Mobile. Try it now.

body_html:
fyi


-----Original Message-----
From: Dan Chipman <dan_chipman@yahoo.com>
To: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Cc: CMi3540012@aol.com; Darren Indyke <dkiesq@aol.com>; Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>; Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; William Rowles <w_rowles@yahoo.com>; Monique Harry <moniqueharry@hotmail.com>
Sent: Thu, 14 Feb 2008 9:20 am
Subject: Standish Building

John,
As a backup to our conversation this A.M.. I recommend that we terminate our contract with Standish Building Co. on failure to produce as agreed. We had the issue with A. Smith and then John and I spent time meeting on St. John, getting redirected and with the promise that he would be on site mid week to start our project with a competent foreman and crew. He has failed to show or call. One of the ithings that I wanted to gain by our meeting was that Lafayette was doing all it could to honor our end of the deal. I trust that you will cover all of the legal bases and get Newman and Moll (if that is agreed upon with Charles and Darren) on board ASAP.
 
Thanks, Dan
